\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5809 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{total}} = \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{gravity}}^{\text{acc}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{Vimana}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{galaxy}} + \hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{coupling}} \end{equation}
